final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    input [1:0] opcode,
    output reg [7:0] result
    );  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            result <= 0;
        end else begin
            case (opcode)
                2'b00: result <= a + b;
                2'b01: result <= a - b;
                2'b10: result <= a * b;
                2'b11: result <= a / b;
            endcase
        end
    end

endmodule
